purva: Snehana (internal oleation) + Svedana for 3–7 days. Give Kapha-aggravating diet the night before.
procedure: Administer Yashtimadhu kashaya + Madanaphala pippali + honey. Patient sits facing east. Emesis occurs 4–8 times.
pascha: Samsarjana karma (graded dietary protocol). Begin with peya (thin rice gruel) and progress over 7 days.

purva: Snehana (Ghrita internally, Abhyanga externally) for 3–7 days. Svedana. Deepana-pachana first.
procedure: Administer Trivrit churna or Haritaki in hot water or casava. 10–30 purgations expected for complete sodhana.
pascha: Samsarjana karma. Light diet — avoid heavy, spicy, sour foods for 7 days.

purva: Mild Snehana and Svedana. No fasting required. Light evening meal.
procedure: Two types: (1) Anuvasana Basti — oil enema 60-120 mL warm sesame/Dashamoola oil. (2) Kashaya/Niruha Basti — decoction 480 mL with honey, rock salt, oil, paste.
pascha: Rest for 30-45 min after retention. Light warm diet. Avoid cold, heavy foods.

purva: Local facial Abhyanga and Svedana (steam) for 3 days.
procedure: Patient lies supine, neck hyperextended. 6–8 drops of medicated oil (Anu taila, Shadbindu taila) instilled in each nostril. Inhale deeply. Repeat 7 days.
pascha: Avoid cold air, cold water, dust for 3 hrs. No heavy meal immediately after.

purva: Deepana-pachana herbs. Mild Snehana. No fasting. Leech selection and preparation (kept in turmeric water for 30 min).
procedure: Leech application: apply single leech to affected area. Confirmed attachment by S-curve posture. Average extraction 20-60 mL blood over 30-45 min.
pascha: Apply turmeric paste to wound. Light diet. Avoid fermented foods for 3 days.
